summary: Completed testing of TABLEAU CK integration and CSS redesign. All backend tests passed (14/14). Frontend loads correctly with new blue color scheme (#1e3a5f background, #4f6df5 accents). Questionnaire flow works.
critical_code_review_comments: Note: profile_summary.dominant_vertus uses Ennéagramme-derived vertu, while profile_summary.vertus.dominant uses VV questions. This is by design but could be confusing - consider documenting this distinction.

API endpoints /api/job-match and /api/explore return correct data structures.
